title: Craftable Mob Spawner Recipe
body:
# Craftable Mob Spawner 

**Build Your Own Farm Core**

Mob spawners are the heart of any good XP farm — but in vanilla Minecraft, they’re untouchable. You find one in a dungeon and that’s it. No moving, no crafting, no customizing. This datapack flips the script and lets you craft your own spawner like a true farm architect.

Note: “Mob Spawner Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack. If you are interested in more datapacks, check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Bette**r

Because grinding for XP shouldn’t depend on random dungeon placement. Whether you're building a blaze farm in the Nether, a skeleton grinder near your base, or just want full control over your mob setup, this pack gives you the power to place spawners where you need them.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip

2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder

3. Type /reload in-game

4. Start crafting your mob spawner and take control of your farms
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
